title: Elytra Swap
description: Brings 1.19.4 elytra/armor swapping to earlier versions.
body: # Elytra Swap ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/MC-1.19--1.19.3%20|%201.18.2-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Server-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) --- Brings 1.19.4 elytra/armor swapping to earlier versions. Just as you would do in 1.19.4 and beyond, simply "use" the armor or elytra (right click) to swap it with what you already have equipped! --- ## Maintenance mode Since this is backporting a 1.19.4 feature, this will obviously not receive updates for versions 1.19.4 and on.
